notes: First APK with react-native-bluetooth-escpos-printer and react-native-tcp-socket compiled in. Includes Android Bluetooth permissions: BLUETOOTH, BLUETOOTH_ADMIN, BLUETOOTH_CONNECT, BLUETOOTH_SCAN, ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION, ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION. The postinstall script (scripts/fix-native-modules.js) patches the package's outdated build.gradle (removes jcenter, upgrades to compileSdkVersion 34, adds AndroidX namespace) and its RNBluetoothManagerModule.java (android.support.v4 → androidx.core) so it compiles against modern Android SDK.
